message:
perf(render): skip hyperlink bookkeeping when no links are active or registered

Guard emit_link_changes() calls in both emit_cell() and emit_blank()
behind a check for whether any link state exists. When the frame has
no link registry and no link is currently active, the hyperlink
protocol escape sequences are entirely skipped, avoiding unnecessary
work on every cell render in the common no-links case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
